# Copilot Instructions for deepscrape

## Use repository skills first for UI tasks
- For UI/UX design requests, use `.github/skills/ui-designer-skill/SKILL.md` as the primary style guide.
- Follow the style references in `.github/skills/ui-designer-skill/references/`.
- Default to accessible implementations that meet WCAG AA contrast.

## Implementation constraints
- Keep changes consistent with existing Angular + Tailwind patterns.
- Prefer design tokens/CSS variables over hard-coded values.
- Avoid introducing new UI frameworks unless explicitly requested.
